form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of eight months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at Del Mar Turf August 2 over 1609m, 16 len behind Hawker with 56.5kg at $44.70. Previously first up; fourth of 8 at Santa Anita Turf May 9 over 1811m, 10 len behind Smooth Salute carrying 57kg at $58.70. Sure to be ready to run well.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.5 len at this track March 29 over 914m defeating Hydroplane carrying 56kg at $11.10. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at Los Alamitos on December 6 over 1106m, 17 len behind Desert Kat with 55.5kg at $73.20. Worth consideration.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 3rd in a small field at this track on March 29 over 914m, 1.1 len behind Fuego Del Sol with 57kg at $2.50. The start before that won by a nose at this track February 21 over 914m defeating Summer Haze with 57kg at $7. Winning hope.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at this track on February 21 over 914m, 6 len behind Voucher with 57kg at $4.10. Last start ran last in a small field at Santa Anita on March 27 over 1106m, 21 len behind Sendit Mo carrying 54.5kg at $23. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 2nd in a small field at this track on March 29 over 914m, 1.0 len behind Fuego Del Sol carrying 56kg at $3.90.
